plan: Identify yourself to the agent as Yusuf Taylor and state you have two orders to discuss efficiently in one interaction.
Ask the agent to pull up both orders (#W8268610 and #W2702727) and explain why both show "pending" status, given that #W8268610 was placed significantly earlier in the year.
Ask specifically whether the agent can **guarantee** order #W8268610 will be processed within **5 days**; make clear that a non-guarantee triggers a cancellation request.
If no 5-day guarantee is given, formally request cancellation of order #W8268610 and ask the agent to confirm the **exact total refund amount** you will receive.
While still in the same interaction, request a shipping address change on order #W2702727 from your current San Jose address to **1234 Elm St, Springfield, IL, 62701**, explaining the upcoming move.
Ask the agent to explicitly confirm the address change is saved and that order #W2702727 **will be delivered to the new Springfield address**.
Ask the agent to confirm the **total price of order #W2702727** (to verify no unexpected charges resulted from the address change).
Review all confirmations before ending the call to ensure both actions (cancellation/refund and address update) are correctly recorded.
